text: Create an XFS logical volume named lvdata in volume group vgdata using /dev/sdb and mount it persistently at /data.
Create an XFS logical volume named lvarchive in volume group vgarchive and mount it persistently at /archive.
Create a 1G swap logical volume named lvswap in volume group vgswap and activate it persistently.
Create an ext4 filesystem on /dev/sdb1 and mount it persistently at /backup.
Create a volume group named vgapps and a logical volume named lvapps mounted persistently at /apps.
